title: ENTITLED WOKE BRATS DESTROYED BY BURGER KING AS $30 MINIMUM WAGE BACKFIRES
description:
TheQuartering reacts to Burger King's new AI chatbot "Patty," arguing that rising minimum wage demands are accelerating a dystopian transition toward total automation in the fast food industry.

#TheQuartering #BurgerKing #AI #Automation #MinimumWage #FastFood #CultureWar #Economy #PattyAI #LaborMarket
